don.simpleMeaning: This is not a real word here
don.contextMeaning: It is part of “don’t,” meaning do not
don.sentence: You don’t need to look at lots of websites or reviews.

need.contextMeaning: You do not have to do it
need.sentence: You don’t need to look at lots of websites or reviews.

look.contextMeaning: You do not have to search through them
look.sentence: You don’t need to look at lots of websites or reviews.

lots.contextMeaning: A big number of websites or reviews
lots.sentence: You don’t need to look at lots of websites or reviews.

websites.contextMeaning: Online pages you can open and read
websites.sentence: You don’t need to look at lots of websites or reviews.

reviews.contextMeaning: Things people write after using or seeing them
reviews.sentence: You don’t need to look at lots of websites or reviews.

saves.sentence: It saves time and helps you decide faster.

helps.sentence: It saves time and helps you decide faster.

decide.sentence: It saves time and helps you decide faster.

faster.sentence: It saves time and helps you decide faster.

wonder.simpleMeaning: Think about something in your mind
wonder.contextMeaning: He is thinking about whether it will change things
wonder.sentence: B: I wonder if this will change how people explore new places.

people.contextMeaning: Human beings who may use it
people.sentence: B: I wonder if this will change how people explore new places.

explore.simpleMeaning: Go and look around a place
explore.contextMeaning: Travel and look around new places
explore.sentence: B: I wonder if this will change how people explore new places.

places.contextMeaning: New areas or locations people go to explore
places.sentence: B: I wonder if this will change how people explore new places.

maybe.contextMeaning: It is possible they will discover more hidden spots
maybe.sentence: Maybe we’ll discover more hidden spots.

ll.contextMeaning: The speaker says they will try it later
ll.sentence: Maybe we’ll discover more hidden spots.

discover.contextMeaning: Find hidden spots they did not know before
discover.sentence: Maybe we’ll discover more hidden spots.

hidden.contextMeaning: Quiet spots that are not easy to notice
hidden.sentence: Maybe we’ll discover more hidden spots.

spots.contextMeaning: Small places that are not easy to find
spots.sentence: Maybe we’ll discover more hidden spots.

help.contextMeaning: Make it easier for people to find new places
help.sentence: It could help people find new places they wouldn’t find otherwise.

wouldn.contextMeaning: They would not find those places without this
wouldn.sentence: It could help people find new places they wouldn’t find otherwise.

otherwise.contextMeaning: Without this, they would not find those places
otherwise.sentence: It could help people find new places they wouldn’t find otherwise.

language.contextMeaning: English words people use to speak and learn
language.sentence: And for language learners like us, it’s also a good way to practice asking questions in English.

learners.contextMeaning: People learning English, like the speakers
learners.sentence: And for language learners like us, it’s also a good way to practice asking questions in English.

asking.contextMeaning: Practicing how to say questions in English
asking.sentence: And for language learners like us, it’s also a good way to practice asking questions in English.

try.contextMeaning: Use it once to see if it works well
try.sentence: I’ll try using it next time I go out.

using.simpleMeaning: Taking something and doing with it
using.contextMeaning: Doing things with it for the first time
using.sentence: I’ll try using it next time I go out.

next.simpleMeaning: After this one; coming after now
next.contextMeaning: The following time you do it
next.sentence: I’ll try using it next time I go out.

go.simpleMeaning: Move from one place to another
go.sentence: I’ll try using it next time I go out.

favorite.contextMeaning: The café you like more than others
favorite.sentence: Who knows, maybe I’ll find my new favorite café!

most.contextMeaning: Nearly all people use them for directions
most.sentence: Most people use them for directions, but now, with Ask Maps, you can ask much more detailed questions and get quick, personal answers.

quick.contextMeaning: The answers come in a short time
quick.sentence: Most people use them for directions, but now, with Ask Maps, you can ask much more detailed questions and get quick, personal answers.

personal.contextMeaning: Answers made just for you and what you like
personal.sentence: Most people use them for directions, but now, with Ask Maps, you can ask much more detailed questions and get quick, personal answers.

answers.simpleMeaning: What you say back to a question
answers.contextMeaning: The replies you get from asking questions
answers.sentence: Most people use them for directions, but now, with Ask Maps, you can ask much more detailed questions and get quick, personal answers.

learned.contextMeaning: We found out this information today
learned.sentence: Today we learned that Google Maps is becoming smarter, thanks to Gemini AI.

becoming.simpleMeaning: Starting to change into something new
becoming.contextMeaning: It is changing and getting smarter
becoming.sentence: Today we learned that Google Maps is becoming smarter, thanks to Gemini AI.

smarter.simpleMeaning: Able to think and do better
smarter.contextMeaning: It can do more helpful things now
smarter.sentence: Today we learned that Google Maps is becoming smarter, thanks to Gemini AI.

thanks.simpleMeaning: Used to show you are happy about help
thanks.contextMeaning: Because of Gemini AI, it got better
thanks.sentence: Today we learned that Google Maps is becoming smarter, thanks to Gemini AI.

practicing.simpleMeaning: Doing something again and again to get better
practicing.contextMeaning: Doing English again and again with real questions
practicing.sentence: Remember, practicing English with real questions is a great way to improve.

real.contextMeaning: Questions from real life, not pretend ones
real.sentence: Remember, practicing English with real questions is a great way to improve.

improve.sentence: Remember, practicing English with real questions is a great way to improve.

listening.simpleMeaning: Paying attention to sounds or words
listening.sentence: Thanks for listening, and see you next time!

lesson.simpleMeaning: A class or study time about one topic
lesson.contextMeaning: The study part of today's English practice on the website
lesson.sentence: If you want to practice more, open today's lesson page at ovienglish.com for the transcript, vocabulary support, and quiz.

page.simpleMeaning: A part of a book or website
page.contextMeaning: The screen you open for today's lesson online
page.sentence: If you want to practice more, open today's lesson page at ovienglish.com for the transcript, vocabulary support, and quiz.

quiz.contextMeaning: A short test to check what you learned
quiz.sentence: If you want to practice more, open today's lesson page at ovienglish.com for the transcript, vocabulary support, and quiz.

opening.contextMeaning: The first words at the start of the video
opening.sentence: [OPENING] Welcome back to Ovi English School, where we make learning English fun and easy!

news.contextMeaning: Information about the Google Maps update
news.sentence: [NEWS STORY] A: Hey, did you hear about the new update to Google Maps?

called.sentence: [PRACTICE] QUESTION: What is the new feature in Google Maps called?

word.sentence: QUESTION: What does the word “now” mean in the sentence, “What’s open now?” ANSWER: It means at this moment, not earlier or later.

sentence.simpleMeaning: A group of words that says something
sentence.contextMeaning: The line of words “What’s open now?”
sentence.sentence: QUESTION: What does the word “now” mean in the sentence, “What’s open now?” ANSWER: It means at this moment, not earlier or later.

give.sentence: QUESTION: How does Google Maps give more personal answers?

remembers.contextMeaning: It keeps your likes in mind
remembers.sentence: ANSWER: It remembers what you like and can answer with more details, like showing your favorite types of places.

types.sentence: ANSWER: It remembers what you like and can answer with more details, like showing your favorite types of places.

why.contextMeaning: Asking the reason the answers may not be perfect
why.sentence: QUESTION: Why might the answers from Ask Maps not always be perfect?

fully.contextMeaning: It may not understand the question completely
fully.sentence: ANSWER: Sometimes it might not fully understand your question, or some information could be out of date.

date.simpleMeaning: A time on a day calendar
date.sentence: ANSWER: Sometimes it might not fully understand your question, or some information could be out of date.

speakers.sentence: QUESTION: What do the speakers think about the new feature?

closing.contextMeaning: The part where the speaker ends the talk and asks one last question
closing.sentence: [CLOSING] So, did you think about how you use maps?
